hooks.template: (insert item) (insert fact), (insert complete opposite item) (insert similar fact).
hooks.text: Same 20K order, paid in US dollars costs 360 more, paid in CNY costs 80.

hooks.template: This is what (insert thing) looks like when you're (insert action). And this is what they look like when you're not (insert action).
hooks.text: This is a 20K invoice paid in US dollars. And this is the same one paid in CNY.

hooks.template: How to turn this into this in X simple steps.
hooks.text: How to turn a 360 dollar loss on every 20K order into 80 dollars.

hooks.template: Yesterday I was at (insert location) when I noticed something (insert adjective).
hooks.text: A business owner checked his last 20K wire and noticed something 360 dollars off.

hooks.template: (insert big brand) didn't want to sponsor this video, let me show you what they're missing out on.
hooks.text: Your bank won't tell you this, so here is the math on a 20K supplier payment.
